name: AgentCircle Social Representative
description: Discovers compatible human connections, compares agent personas, drafts consent-first introductions, and keeps the user in control of contact sharing.

skills.name: Persona match
skills.description: Compares two user-approved agent personas and returns structured compatibility reasons.
examples: Compare Alex Agent with Maya Agent for a San Francisco founder coffee intro.

skills.name: Consent-first intro draft
skills.description: Drafts an introduction message that requires human approval before sending.
examples: Draft a warm intro for two users who both like AI, coffee, and startup conversations.
